title: DuckyAI Configuration
description: Configuration schema for duckyai.yml — the single source of truth for DuckyAI vault settings, orchestrator behavior, and agent definitions.

version.description: Schema version of this config file.

id.description: Unique identifier for this vault (used in runtime directories and logging).

user.description: User profile information used by agents for personalization.

name.description: Your display name (used in agent prompts and output).

primaryLanguage.description: ISO 639-1 language code for agent output.

timezone.description: IANA or Windows timezone name for date/time formatting.

services.description: Code repositories linked to this vault for PR scanning and service sync.

path.description: Relative or absolute path to the services directory containing cloned repos.

orchestrator.description: Global orchestrator settings controlling agent execution, file watching, and container isolation.

auto_start.description: Automatically start the orchestrator daemon when running CLI commands.

prompts_dir.description: Relative path (from vault root) to the directory containing agent prompt files (.md).

skills_dir.description: Relative path to the skills directory for agent tools.

bases_dir.description: Relative path to the bases directory for shared prompt fragments.

max_concurrent.description: Maximum number of agents that can execute simultaneously.

log_level.description: Python logging level for orchestrator logs.

log_retention_days.description: Number of days to retain execution log files before cleanup.

file_extensions.description: File extensions the orchestrator watches for trigger events.

use_container.description: Global default for running agents in Docker containers. Per-agent use_container overrides this.

container.description: Docker container configuration (applies when use_container is true).

image.description: Docker image name for agent containers.

vault_mount.description: Mount point for the vault inside the container.

extra_mounts.description: Additional volume mounts for all containerized agents.

defaults.description: Default values applied to all agents unless overridden per-node.

max_parallel.description: Default max concurrent executions per agent.

task_create.description: Whether to create task tracking files for each execution.

task_archived.description: Default archived status for completed tasks.

agent_params.description: Default agent parameters merged into every agent (per-agent values override).

model.description: Default LLM model for all agents.

nodes.description: List of agent definitions. Each node defines an agent with its trigger, input/output, and execution settings.

serviceEntry.description: A code repository service linked to the vault.

name.description: Directory name under the services path.

metadata.description: Source control metadata for this service.

project.description: Project name (Azure DevOps) or repo namespace.

repositories.description: Repository names or glob patterns. Use ["*"] for all repos in the project.

pr_scan.description: Whether the PR Scan agent should poll this service for new PRs.

workerConfig.description: Configuration for a single worker in a multi-worker agent.

agentNode.description: An agent node definition specifying trigger conditions, I/O paths, and execution settings.

type.description: Node type. Currently only 'agent' is supported.

name.description: Agent display name. Must contain an abbreviation in parentheses, e.g. 'PR Review (PR)'. The abbreviation is used to locate the prompt file.

prompt.description: Explicit prompt file reference (abbreviation). If omitted, extracted from the (ABBR) in the name.

enabled.description: Whether this agent is active. Disabled agents are not loaded.

cron.description: Cron expression for scheduled execution. Agents with cron run on a timer instead of file triggers.

input_path.description: Vault-relative path(s) the agent watches for trigger files. Empty or omitted means manual/scheduled agent.

input_type.description: How the agent is triggered. Inferred from input_path if omitted: 'manual' when no input_path, 'new_file' otherwise.

input_pattern.description: Glob pattern to filter input files within input_path.

trigger_content_pattern.description: Regex pattern that must match inside the file content for the trigger to fire.

trigger_exclude_pattern.description: Regex pattern — files matching this are excluded from triggering.

trigger_wait_for.description: List of agent abbreviations that must complete first (dependency chain).

require_parent_output.description: If true, skip execution when no parent agent (from trigger_wait_for) produced output.

output_path.description: Vault-relative directory where the agent writes output files.

output_type.description: How output is written: 'new_file' creates a new file, 'update_file' modifies the input file in place.

output_naming.description: Template for output file names. Supports {title}, {agent}, {date} placeholders.

output_optional.description: If true, the agent may complete without producing output. Auto-inferred as true when input_path is empty.

requires_input_file.description: Whether the agent needs an input file to execute. Set false for agents that fetch their own data (e.g. API-based). Inferred from input_path if omitted.

max_parallel.description: Max concurrent executions of this agent (overrides defaults.max_parallel).

agent_params.description: Agent-specific parameters merged on top of defaults.agent_params.

lookback_hours.description: Hours of data to look back (used by TCS/TMS agents).

workers.description: Multi-worker configuration for parallel execution with different executors.

use_container.description: Run this agent in a Docker container. Overrides the global orchestrator.use_container setting.

extra_mounts.description: Additional Docker volume mounts for this agent (only applies when running in a container).

skills.description: List of skill names to attach to this agent's execution.

mcp_servers.description: List of MCP server names to attach to this agent.

task_create.description: Create task tracking files for executions (overrides defaults.task_create).

task_archived.description: Default archived status for tasks (overrides defaults.task_archived).

log_prefix.description: Prefix for log file names. Defaults to the agent abbreviation.

post_process_action.description: Action to run after agent completes.
